title: JVL Handmade Buff Wicker Hampers with Faux Leather Straps, Medium
availability_text: Only 6 left in stock (more on the way).
features: A must have accessory for every household, our willow hamper is woven into shape by hand.
The neutral tone allows it to work well with most interior, both traditional and modern styles
Use as storage to help organise the home with style, then close the lid and the room is clear of clutter
The basket has two faux leather straps to keep the lids closed and they're great for picnics and or gift hampers too
Medium H:27 x W:49x D:31cm approx. Capacity:41 l approx.
description: This beautiful willow storage hamper is perfect for using around the home. It's handmade and woven from willow, giving a traditional feel while the natural willow colour allows it to sit in any modern space, meaning its suitable for most interior styles. The rectangular storage hamper can be used as handy storage or to style around the home as a feature. The simple styling makes this the perfect solution for home and storage needs and suitable for use in any room such as the bedroom, living room, laundry/utility room, playroom or the office. What's even better is you can tidy things away and close the lid. Willow is rapidly renewable; renewable materials come from living sources and regrow as quick as they’re used. Our artisans use these raw fibres to handcraft our woven baskets. The neutral tones and strength make it ideal for basket-weaving and complement the home decor.
